reviews.comment:
Hola buenos días soy de la provincia de San Juan y quisiera comunicarme con el propietario de YPF Acá, en cuanto pueda comuníquese. El día martes 29 dejé un cable de la computadora, quisiera saber si todavía se encuentran ahí. Gracias

(Translated by Google)
Hello, good morning. I'm from the province of San Juan and I'd like to contact the owner of the YPF station here. Please get in touch as soon as possible. I left a computer cable there on Tuesday the 29th; I'd like to know if it's still there. Thank you.
